summary.lv: ELCOIN LTD Latvijas filiāle meklē Client Service Desk speciālistu ar pieredzi IT atbalstā vai klientu apkalpošanā, kurš/-a reģistrēs pieprasījumus, klasificēs incidentus un nodrošinās to savlaicīgu atrisinājumu.
summary.en: ELCOIN LTD Latvia branch is looking for a Client Service Desk Specialist with 6+ months of IT support or customer service experience to log tickets, classify incidents, and ensure SLA-compliant resolution.
